title: lithocarpus polystachyus
intro: Lithocarpus polystachyus, also known as the Bur oak or Island live oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to California and the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain, swelling, and oxidative stress. The health benefits of Lithocarpus polystachyus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Lithocarpus polystachyus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
